allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\github\\chizunurie\\frontend\\public" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, @{N='MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh repo create chizunurie --private --description "白地図塗りゲーム - 日本の行政区域をクリックして色を塗るWebアプリ" --source "d:\\github\\chizunurie" --remote origin --push)

PowerShell(cd d:\\github\\chizunurie\\backend; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "tsx","src/index.ts" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3001/health -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(cd d:\\github\\chizunurie\\backend; Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location d:\\github\\chizunurie\\backend; node_modules\\.bin\\tsx src/index.ts } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3001/health -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); f=d.get\('features',[{}]\)[0]; print\('first feature properties:', f.get\('properties'\)\)")
